title: Hoorebekia greenei
taxonomy: Hoorebekia greenei is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Polygonaceae. This family is commonly known as the buckwheat or smartweed family. The genus Hoorebekia is a small group of plants, and Hoorebekia greenei is the only species within this genus. It is a herbaceous perennial plant native to the southwestern United States. The classification of Hoorebekia greenei is still a subject of ongoing research and classification systems may vary.
